title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 18 - 2017: 5 kilometer diameter in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a stressful few days dealing with lost audiobooks (eventually recovering 82GB from Carbonite), working late nights on his website's timeline feature with color-coded 500-year blocks, dealing with car and apartment maintenance issues, financial stress around debt, and briefly mentions enjoying smoking weed while writing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: storing drives vertically kills them — discs need to align with gravity
smoking weed slows proofreading but writing is still enjoyable; just requires more run-throughs
glad he had it — saved his audiobook collection when all other backups failed
